import subprocess
import os

home = os.path.expanduser("~")
test_locs = ["/tmp", "/var/tmp", home, "/opt"]
exec_ok = []

for loc in test_locs:
    try:
        test_path = os.path.join(loc, "test_exec.sh")
        with open(test_path, "w") as f:
            f.write("#!/bin/sh
echo OK")
        os.chmod(test_path, 0o755)
        p = subprocess.run([test_path], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=2)
        if "OK" in p.stdout:
            exec_ok.append(loc)
        os.remove(test_path)
    except:
        pass

result = f"EXEC_OK: {exec_ok} | HOME: {home}"
result
